SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.io

Class SequentialFile

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.io.AbstractFile
com.nib.commons.io.SequentialFile
public class SequentialFile extends AbstractFile
Represents a sequential file with various I/O operations.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class com.nib.commons.io.AbstractFile

    _status, context, dataEncoding, ddName, exceptionsEnabled, fileStatus, handle, isOpen, lockMode, openMode, record, recordEncoding, recordLimits, recordsRead, recordsWritten

    Reads the next record from the file, optionally applying a lock.

      ddName - The DD name of the file.

    • open

      public FileIOResponse open(OpenMode openMode) throws FileIOException
      Opens the file in the specified open mode, delegating to the open(OpenMode, LockMode) method with a shared lock mode.
      Overrides:
      open in class AbstractFile
      Parameters:
      openMode - The open mode for the file.
      Returns:
      The FileIOResponse representing the I/O operation response.
      Throws:
      FileIOException - If an I/O error occurs.

    • readHeaderOnRecord

      public SequentialFile readHeaderOnRecord()
      Sets the flag to indicate that the header is present on each record.
      Returns:
      The SequentialFile instance with the header-on-record flag set to true.

    • open

      public FileIOResponse open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode)
      Opens the file with the specified open mode and lock mode, initializing the I/O API accordingly.
      Overrides:
      open in class AbstractFile
      Parameters:
      openMode - The open mode for the file.
      lockMode - The lock mode for the file.
      Returns:
      The FileIOResponse representing the I/O operation response.

    • read

      public FileIOResponse read()
      Reads the next record from the file without locking.
      Returns:
      The FileIOResponse representing the I/O operation response.

    • readNext

      public FileIOResponse readNext(boolean lock)
      Reads the next record from the file, optionally applying a lock.
      Specified by:
      readNext in class AbstractFile
      Parameters:
      lock - Flag indicating whether to apply a lock while reading.
      Returns:
      The FileIOResponse representing the I/O operation response.

    • readPrev

      public FileIOResponse readPrev(boolean lock)
      Reads the previous record from the file, optionally applying a lock.
      Specified by:
      readPrev in class AbstractFile
      Parameters:
      lock - Flag indicating whether to apply a lock while reading.
      Returns:
      The FileIOResponse representing the I/O operation response.

      Writes the current record to the file.
      Specified by:

      Returns:
      The FileIOResponse representing the I/O operation response.
